summary: Iter 37 backend-only: (1) Employee profile-edit expansion (designation, present_address, permanent_address, family_members) and (2) Company-code admin-pin-login. Wrote pytest suite with 23 tests, all PASS on public URL. Verified: role gating, empty family-name row stripping, invalid DOB → 400, identical-list produces no delta, admin review UI receives BEFORE via employee doc, approval applies new fields (list replace + empty-list clears), PATCH /admin/user-role direct edits new fields and enforces company scope, admin-pin-login with company_code (case-insensitive) resolves to earliest-created admin with pin_hash, 5-fail lockout works, unknown code → 404, no-active-PIN-admin → 403, legacy identifier path still works and takes priority when both provided. IT37_* seed rows cleaned up.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 4915 lines — long-standing issue (already flagged in prior iterations); consider splitting auth, admin, profile-edit into separate routers.

PATCH /admin/user-role returns the target user (with mongo _id excluded) but does NOT persist company_code_override history / audit trail; acceptable for now but a lightweight audit log would help forensic reviews of direct edits (which skip approval).
seed_data_creation: IT37_* prefix — 3 companies, 1 employee (signup+PIN), 4 company_admins (primary with pin_hash, secondary with pin_hash, admin B, admin C without pin_hash), 1 employee in B, 1 throwaway super_admin. All rows deleted in module teardown. Confirmed 0 orphans post-run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iter37_profile_expansion_and_company_code_login.py — self-contained fixture, no dependency on external state, safe to re-run. It seeds and tears down IT37_* rows so it will not touch other iterations' data. Uses env vars EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, MONGO_URL, DB_NAME (fails fast if missing).
rca_of_issue: n/a — no bugs found. All 8 scenarios from features_or_bugs_to_test list plus the three edge cases (case-insensitive code, earliest-created admin selection, family_members identical → no delta) verified passing against the live backend.
